title: Quick Chicken Tacos
description: Spiced chicken folded into warm tortillas with crisp toppings.
steps: Dice chicken into bite-sized pieces. Toss with cumin and salt.
Heat olive oil in a skillet over medium-high. Cook chicken until browned, ~6 min.
Warm tortillas in a dry pan, 30 seconds per side.
Fill tortillas with chicken, diced onion, cilantro, and a squeeze of lime.

title: Black Bean Burrito Bowl
description: Hearty bean and rice bowl with fresh salsa and avocado.
steps: Cook rice according to package instructions.
Drain and rinse black beans; warm in a small pot with a pinch of salt.
Dice tomato and onion; toss with lime juice and chopped cilantro.
Build bowls: rice, beans, salsa, sliced avocado on top.

title: Cheese Quesadillas
description: Crispy tortillas with melted cheese — a 10-minute classic.
steps: Heat a dry skillet over medium heat.
Place a tortilla in the pan, sprinkle cheese, top with another tortilla.
Cook 2 minutes per side until cheese melts and tortillas are golden.
Cut into wedges and serve.

title: Fresh Guacamole
description: Bright, chunky guac with lime and cilantro.
steps: Halve avocados, remove pits, and scoop into a bowl.
Mash to your preferred texture.
Stir in finely diced onion, chopped cilantro, lime juice, and salt.
Fold in diced tomato if using.

title: Spaghetti Aglio e Olio
description: Garlicky olive oil pasta — five ingredients, big flavor.
steps: Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil. Cook pasta until al dente.
Meanwhile, slice garlic thinly. Warm olive oil in a wide pan over low heat.
Add garlic and red pepper flakes; cook gently until fragrant, 2 minutes.
Drain pasta, reserving 1/2 cup pasta water.
Toss pasta with garlic oil and a splash of pasta water. Top with parsley.

title: Caprese Salad
description: Tomato, mozzarella, and basil with a drizzle of olive oil.
steps: Slice tomatoes and mozzarella into 1/4-inch rounds.
Arrange alternating slices on a plate with whole basil leaves.
Drizzle with olive oil, sprinkle salt and pepper, serve immediately.

title: Margherita Flatbread
description: Quick weeknight pizza on flatbread or pita.
steps: Heat oven to 450°F.
Place flatbreads on a baking sheet. Spread sauce, scatter torn mozzarella.
Bake 8-10 minutes until cheese bubbles and edges crisp.
Top with basil leaves, drizzle olive oil, finish with salt.

title: Pesto Pasta
description: Bright basil pesto tossed with hot pasta.
steps: Cook pasta in salted boiling water until al dente.
Blend basil, garlic, parmesan, olive oil, and pine nuts into a smooth pesto.
Reserve 1/4 cup pasta water. Drain pasta.
Toss pasta with pesto and a splash of pasta water to loosen.

title: Tomato Bruschetta
description: Toasted bread topped with marinated tomato and basil.
steps: Slice bread on the diagonal and toast until golden.
Rub each slice with a halved garlic clove.
Dice tomatoes; mix with chopped basil, olive oil, and salt.
Spoon tomato mixture onto toast and serve.

title: Chana Masala
description: Spiced chickpea curry over rice.
steps: Cook rice. Meanwhile, finely dice onion, garlic, and ginger.
Heat oil in a pot. Sauté onion until golden, ~6 min.
Add garlic, ginger, cumin, garam masala, turmeric. Stir 30 seconds.
Add diced tomato and cook until broken down, ~5 min.
Add drained chickpeas and 1/2 cup water. Simmer 10 minutes.
Season with salt and serve over rice.

title: Aloo Gobi
description: Potato and cauliflower simmered with warm spices.
steps: Cube potatoes and break cauliflower into florets.
Heat oil in a large pan. Sauté diced onion until soft.
Add garlic, cumin, turmeric. Stir 30 seconds.
Add potatoes, cauliflower, diced tomato, and 1/2 cup water.
Cover and simmer 18-22 minutes, stirring occasionally, until tender.
Season with salt and serve.

title: Dal Tadka
description: Yellow lentils tempered with cumin and garlic.
steps: Rinse lentils. Simmer with 3 cups water and turmeric until tender, ~25 min.
Heat butter in a small pan. Add cumin until it sizzles.
Add diced onion and garlic; cook until golden.
Add diced tomato and cook 3 minutes. Stir in salt.
Pour tempering over the cooked lentils and serve.

title: Vegetable Coconut Curry
description: Mixed vegetables in a creamy coconut curry sauce.
steps: Dice all vegetables. Heat oil in a large pot.
Sauté onion and garlic until soft. Stir in curry powder.
Add potatoes, carrots, cauliflower, and coconut milk. Simmer 20 minutes.
Season with salt. Serve over rice or with flatbread.

title: Chicken Teriyaki Rice
description: Glossy teriyaki chicken over fluffy rice.
steps: Cook rice according to package instructions.
Whisk soy sauce, sugar, grated ginger, and minced garlic.
Slice chicken into bite-sized pieces. Sear in oil until cooked through, ~6 min.
Add sauce and reduce until glossy, 2-3 min.
Serve over rice, topped with sliced scallions.

title: Miso Soup
description: Comforting miso broth with tofu and scallions.
steps: Bring 4 cups water to a gentle simmer.
Cube tofu and add with seaweed if using.
Whisk miso paste with a small ladle of broth, then stir back into pot.
Do not boil after adding miso. Top with sliced scallions and serve.

title: Tamago Rice Bowl
description: Fluffy egg over hot rice with soy and scallion.
steps: Cook rice and keep warm.
Beat eggs with a pinch of salt.
Melt butter in a nonstick pan over medium-low. Add eggs and stir into curds.
Top hot rice with eggs, soy sauce, and sliced scallion.

title: Grilled Cheese
description: Buttery, crispy, melty — the classic.
steps: Butter the outside of each bread slice.
Place cheese between slices, butter-side out.
Cook in a skillet over medium-low, ~3 minutes per side, until golden and melted.

title: Classic Cheeseburger
description: Juicy beef patties with melted cheese on a soft bun.
steps: Form ground beef into two patties. Season generously with salt and pepper.
Heat a skillet over high. Cook patties 3 min per side; top with cheese in last minute.
Toast buns. Layer lettuce, tomato slice, patty, onion. Serve.

title: Stovetop Mac and Cheese
description: Creamy stovetop mac, no oven needed.
steps: Cook pasta until al dente. Drain.
In the same pot, melt butter. Whisk in flour and cook 1 minute.
Slowly whisk in milk until smooth. Simmer 2 minutes.
Off heat, stir in cheese until melted. Add pasta and salt; toss to coat.

title: Soft Scrambled Eggs
description: Slow, low-heat scramble for restaurant-soft curds.
steps: Beat eggs with salt.
Melt butter in a nonstick pan over low heat.
Add eggs. Stir constantly with a rubber spatula until just set, ~3-4 min.
Remove from heat while still slightly glossy. Serve immediately.

title: Greek Salad
description: Crunchy, briny, refreshing — no lettuce required.
steps: Chop cucumber and tomato into chunks. Slice onion thinly.
Combine in a bowl with crumbled feta and olives.
Drizzle olive oil, sprinkle oregano and salt, toss gently.

title: Hummus & Pita
description: Creamy chickpea dip with warm pita.
steps: Drain chickpeas, reserving 2 tbsp liquid.
Blend chickpeas, tahini, lemon juice, garlic, olive oil, salt, and reserved liquid.
Adjust seasoning. Warm pita briefly.
Spoon hummus into a bowl, drizzle olive oil, serve with pita.

title: Mediterranean Couscous Bowl
description: Fluffy couscous with chickpeas, cucumber, and lemony dressing.
steps: Cook couscous according to package. Fluff with a fork.
Drain chickpeas. Dice cucumber and tomato.
Toss everything with olive oil, lemon juice, salt, and chopped parsley.

title: Shakshuka
description: Eggs poached in a spiced tomato pepper sauce.
steps: Heat oil in a wide skillet. Sauté diced onion and pepper until soft.
Add garlic, cumin, paprika; stir 30 seconds.
Add diced tomatoes and salt. Simmer 10 minutes until thick.
Make 4 wells in the sauce. Crack an egg into each.
Cover and cook 5-7 minutes until whites are set. Serve from the pan.

title: Thai Basil Chicken
description: Fast, fragrant stir-fry over jasmine rice.
steps: Cook rice. Mince chicken, garlic, and chili.
Heat oil in a wok over high. Add garlic and chili briefly.
Add chicken; stir-fry until cooked, ~4 min.
Add soy, fish sauce, sugar; toss to coat.
Off heat, fold in basil leaves. Serve over rice.

title: Easy Pad See Ew
description: Wide noodles with broccoli and sweet soy.
steps: Soak rice noodles per package directions.
Heat oil in a wok over high. Add minced garlic, then broccoli florets.
Push veg aside, scramble eggs in the empty space.
Add drained noodles, soy, sugar; toss until noodles char slightly.

title: Coconut Curry Soup
description: Creamy, gingery coconut broth with vegetables.
steps: Heat curry paste in a pot 30 seconds; add minced garlic and ginger.
Pour in coconut milk and 1 cup water; simmer 5 minutes.
Add cubed tofu and sliced pepper; simmer 8 minutes.
Stir in soy and lime juice. Taste and adjust.

title: Egg Fried Rice
description: Quick fried rice that uses up leftovers beautifully.
steps: Heat oil in a wok over high. Add minced garlic.
Push aside; scramble eggs into curds.
Add cold cooked rice, breaking up clumps. Stir-fry 3 minutes.
Add diced carrot, peas, and scallion. Pour in soy. Toss and serve.

title: Garlic Stir-Fried Greens
description: Bok choy or any leafy greens, hot and fast.
steps: Wash greens and cut into bite-sized pieces.
Heat oil in a wok until shimmering. Add sliced garlic for 20 seconds.
Add greens; stir-fry until just wilted, ~2 minutes.
Splash with soy and salt. Serve immediately.

title: Sweet and Sour Chicken
description: Crispy chicken in a tangy red sauce.
steps: Cube chicken, toss with cornstarch and a pinch of salt.
Sear in oil over high heat until golden, ~5 min. Remove.
Stir-fry diced pepper and onion 2 min. Add pineapple chunks.
Whisk ketchup, vinegar, sugar, soy with 1/4 cup water; pour in.
Return chicken; toss until glossy. Serve over rice.
